top_signals.title: Traffic Flows Through Hormuz After Shock Container Ship Attack
top_signals.summary: An attack on a container vessel sailing through the Strait of Hormuz has prompted some shipowners to review exit plans, but traffic continued to flow in both directions through the vital thoroughfare on Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Donald Trump Jr set for Kalshi windfall after prediction platform gave him stake
top_signals.summary: Privately owned company’s valuation has soared as US administration has adopted a light-touch approach to the sector
